channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google doesn't pay the Nvidia tax. Its new TPUs explain why.
item.description: Every frontier AI lab right now is rationing two things: electricity and compute. Most of them buy their compute for model training from the same supplier, at the steep gross margins that have turned Nvidia into one of the most valuable companies in the world. Google does not.On Tuesday night, inside a private gathering at F1 Plaza in Las Vegas, Google previewed its eighth-generation Tensor Processing Units. The pitch: two custom silicon designs shipping later this year, each purpose-built for a different half of the modern AI workload. TPU 8t targets training for frontier models, and TPU 8i t...

item.title: Path tracing : pourquoi l’algorithme de Nvidia change vraiment les règles du jeu
item.description: Nvidia vient de publier un algorithme de recherche qui accélère le calcul du ray tracing d'un facteur 2 à 3. Sur le papier, c'est significatif. Dans vos jeux, c'est encore pour plus tard.

item.title: I compared the telephoto zooms of the Oppo Find X9 Ultra against pro cameras, and the side-by-side photos will blow your mind
item.description: I compared the Oppo Find X9 Ultra with a travel zoom compact camera and a pro mirrorless camera — here's what I learned.

item.title: Threads introduces 'live chats' for following live events
item.description: Meta has introduced a new "live chats" feature to Threads, enabling people on the platform to participate in real-time conversations about live events they’re interested in. Live chats can be hosted within Threads communities, the topic-specific social spaces that Meta introduced last year. The new feature sounds a bit like Threads’ take on Instagram’s broadcast channels, but the latter only allows for one-way messaging. Live chats can be hosted by select creators, including Community Champions — users highly engaged within specific communities — and media personalities. Once a chat is launche...

item.title: Threads is adding Live Chats to boost real-time engagement
item.description: Users can send messages, photos, videos, links, and emoji reactions in Live Chats.

item.title: New EV battery promises incredible six-minute charges — as electric cars edge closer to gas pump refueling speeds
item.description: A new battery breakthrough from Chinese giant CATL means we're getting very close to EV charging matching gas refueling speeds.

item.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent building tool for enterprises
item.description: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: it is geared for IT and technical users.

item.title: Anthropic’s Mythos rollout has missed America’s cyberscurity agency
item.description: Several US federal agencies are taking up Anthropic's new cybersecurity model to find vulnerabilities, but one is reportedly not getting in on the action: the nation's central cybersecurity coordinator. On Tuesday, Axios reported that the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) didn't have access to Mythos Preview, which Anthropic has touted as a powerful tool […]...

item.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
item.description: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

item.title: One of the best Verizon deals ever is back — get an iPad or Apple Watch included when you buy an iPhone
item.description: For a limited time, you'll be able to bundle in some high-end Apple accessories alongside your iPhone.

item.title: Microsoft teases mysterious Discord and Xbox Game Pass partnership
item.description: Microsoft has started teasing a new Discord and Xbox Game Pass partnership, just a day after lowering prices of its Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass subscriptions. Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma says the company is partnering with Discord again "as we continue to make Game Pass more flexible for our players." It's not […]

item.title: 271 bugs dans Firefox : comment une IA a fait en quelques jours le travail de mois
item.description: Mozilla vient de corriger 271 vulnérabilités dans Firefox 150, toutes découvertes par Claude Mythos Preview, le modèle d’IA le plus avancé d’Anthropic.

item.title: Google Meet will take AI notes for in-person meetings too
item.description: Google's AI meeting notetaker is no longer limited to Google Meets - Gemini can also generate summaries and transcripts of in-person meetings now, as well as meetings on Zoom and Microsoft Teams, as first reported by 9to5Google. Support for in-person meetings was previously limited to alpha users and only available on Android. Google's support page […]...

item.title: These are the 18 best home office finds under £50 in Amazon's Tech Week sale — I scrolled through the depths of the deals to find all the gear I'd buy to get work done
item.description: The Amazon Tech Week sale has some big bargains for business professionals that you won't want to miss.

item.title: Microsoft says the ‘idea’ of an Xbox mobile store ‘is not dead’
item.description: Microsoft first revealed it was building an Xbox mobile gaming store to take on Apple and Google all the way back in 2022. Former Xbox president Sarah Bond even went on stage at a Bloomberg event nearly two years ago and promised the store would launch in July, 2024. Now, it looks like Microsoft has […]

item.title: Yesway IPO: Stock price will be closely watched today as the convenience store chain makes its Nasdaq debut
item.description: The listing will test investor appetite for brick-and-mortar retail companies at a time when store closures are common. Here’s what to know. While its geographic footprint is all west of the Mississippi, convenience store operator Yesway Inc. is making New York City headlines this week with its initial public offering (IPO).

item.title: The 12 best Garmin watch deals for running, swimming, and hiking at Amazon — save up to $250 on best-rated models
item.description: A Garmin watch is the perfect outdoor companion, and I've rounded up the 12 best deals for running, hikinig and swimming, with prices starting at just $165

item.title: 'Turns out I'm deaf': Someone built a browser tool to test the difference between Hi-Res Audio FLAC and lossy MP3 with your own music, so you've no excuse for getting it wrong
item.description: This ultimate FLAC vs MP3 tool tests whether your ears can pick out lossless vs lossy audio with the tracks you know best

item.title: SpaceX doubles down on AI with its potential $60 billion Cursor buy
item.description: The Musk-led company is leaning harder into software and models as it heads toward a blockbuster IPO. SpaceX still has deep roots in the rocket business, but the Elon Musk-owned company is doubling down on artificial intelligence as it prepares for an IPO.

item.title: Ces caméras qui filment en 1080p s’équipent de l’IA pour la reconnaissance faciale et perdent presque 40 € sur Amazon
item.description: Amazon propose un pack eufyCam très complet. Celui-ci se compose de deux caméras C35 faciles à installer et d'un HomeBase Mini pour distinguer les individus devant votre porte. Un ensemble à retrouver pour presque 20 % de moins.

item.title: Which is the best new iOS 26.4 emoji? Have your say in our reader poll
item.description: Apple's new emoji for your iPhone include an orca, a treasure chest, a trombone, and a "hairy creature".

item.title: Pourquoi Anker se lance dans les semi-conducteurs avec sa puce Thus
item.description: Depuis des années, les AirPods Pro servent d'étalon quand on parle de réduction de bruit et de qualité d'appel en true wireless, c'est précisément ce terrain qu'Anker entend contester avec Thus, sa première puce IA maison.

item.title: Mullvad pushes update in a bid to make your iOS VPN app even more secure — but there's a catch
item.description: Mullvad VPN is rolling out a strict new "Force all apps" feature for its iOS app to prevent data leaks. A massive win for privacy purists, though it requires a manual workaround during future app updates.

item.title: This trackable wallet is made from responsibly sourced, recycled materials — and I think I prefer it to AirTags
item.description: This wallet from Chipolo and Secrid will keep your cards and cash safe, and can be tracked from your phone.

item.title: How to find the right coach
item.description: The evidence is clear: coaching works. But success largely depends on making the correct choice. Human beings are obsessed with change. As large scale scientific studies show, most of us would like to change at least some aspects of our personality, defined as consistent patterns of behaviors or habits that make us who we are and different from others. For example, I’d love to be less impulsive, excitable, or cynical, which is why I have been working on not being myself for many years. Likewise, most individuals want to grow, to develop new adaptations that make them a better version of themse...

item.title: 'Nature has the solution': Researchers fuse DNA and silicon to build Holy Grail of memory storage
item.description: A bio-hybrid memory device combines synthetic DNA and semiconductors to support efficient data storage and processing with stable performance and extremely low energy requirements.

item.title: That's not a sub, THIS is a sub — Deus Audio's 60-inch infrasonic bass driver is nearly 6 feet tall, can hit 8Hz, and handles 20,000W of power. This would be the ultimate home theater upgrade…
item.description: The Invicta 60 is a ludicrously powerful infrasonic subwoofer delvering 20,000W of peak power

item.title: New York Bans Government Employees from Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
item.description: A new executive order seen by WIRED prohibits New York state employees from using insider knowledge to enrich themselves with prediction market bets.

item.title: AI Tools Are Helping Mediocre North Korean Hackers Steal Millions
item.description: One group of hackers used AI for everything from vibe coding their malware to creating fake company websites—and stole as much as $12 million in three months.

item.title: This abandoned steel mill is becoming America’s quantum future
item.description: The Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park could anchor a new ‘Silicon Prairie’ in the Midwest. Bob Dylan, a native of the Upper Midwest, famously crooned that “the times they are a-changin’.” Nowhere is that more prescient now than in and around the Midwest’s largest city, Chicago, which is attempting to shed its skin as a Rust Belt metropolis and be born anew in the twenty-first century as the capital of the “Silicon Prairie,” a hub for the burgeoning quantum computing industry....

item.title: Google Street View devient un outil de création de décors : les studios de cinéma vont pouvoir visualiser leurs scènes depuis un bureau
item.description: Google vient de présenter de nouveaux outils basés sur l'intelligence artificielle pour ses applications cartographiques, annoncés cette semaine à la conférence Cloud Next de Las Vegas. Si ces nouveautés s'adressent en priorité aux professionnels, elles promettent de transformer en profondeur la manière dont l'industrie créative prépare ses projets....

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce Vibes 2.0 targets a hidden failure: context overload in AI agents
item.description: When startup fundraising platform VentureCrowd began deploying AI coding agents, they saw the same gains as other enterprises: they cut the front-end development cycle by 90% in some projects.However, it didn’t come easy or without a lot of trial and error. VentureCrowd’s first challenge revolved around data and context quality, since Diego Mogollon, chief product officer at VentureCrowd, told VentureBeat that “agents reason against whatever data they can access at runtime” and would then be confidently “wrong” because they’re only basing their knowledge on the context given to them.Their othe...

item.title: Rivian R2 production has started despite tornado damage to factory
item.description: The company's all-important mass-market EV is just about ready to start heading to customers.

item.title: Beat the UK heat surge with these ultra-cool home office finds — I found the best home office finds to stay cool when the temperatures are rising
item.description: From desk fans to breathable office chairs, get your workspace ready for the heat.

item.title: 'EVs have to be fun': Kia lifts the lid on its wild Vision Meta Turismo concept that uses a joystick as a gear shifter
item.description: Kia unveils a Vision Met Turismo concept that hints at future sporty electric saloon for the brand.

item.title: Sullivan's Crossing season 4 losing Scott Patterson to 'untenable creative differences' could be an unexpected lifeline for Netflix's Virgin River season 8
item.description: Scott Patterson won't return to Sullivan's Crossing season 4 because of "creative differences" — but could this be a slam dunk for Virgin River season 8?

item.title: This is the surprising science behind the potato breed in your bag of chips
item.description: Michigan professor David Douches explains why the perfect chipping potato is so hard to find. There’s a surprising amount of science in a bag of potato chips.Researchers have spent decades developing potatoes for chip makers that can grow in all kinds of climates, avoid diseases and pests, sit in storage for months and still deliver a satisfying crunch. They’ve also kept an eye on consumer trends; a shift to snack-size portions has increased the demand for smaller chipping potatoes, for example.“The potato industry is dynamic,” said David Douches, a Michigan State University professor who lead...

item.title: Google Cloud Next 2026: all the live details from Google Cloud's biggest annual event
item.description: Join us as we cover all the live news straight from Google Cloud Next 2026

item.title: Cosmetics giant Rituals confirms data breach of customer membership records
item.description: The cosmetics retailer, which counts 41 million customers in its membership data, declined to provide an accurate total number of customers affected.

item.title: SolarFlow 4000 Mix Pro et AC+ : la batterie domestique ultime arrive en France
item.description: Zendure lance sa série SolarFlow Mix, une plateforme capable de jongler entre vos panneaux, votre pompe à chaleur et les tarifs dynamiques d'EDF. Au total, il y a trois nouvelles batteries.

item.title: How I scored ad-free Paramount+ Premium for only 99 cents
item.description: Ad-free Paramount+ deal: Returning subscribers can get two months of Premium for just 99 cents per month. That's $26 in savings.

item.title: Will a new CEO help realize Apple’s smart home potential?
item.description: It took Tim Cook years to launch Apple into major new hardware categories, such as the smartwatch. But John Ternus could start his tenure right away with an ambitious new project: smart home hardware. All signs point to a strong lineup of new smart home devices coming potentially this fall, putting Apple back in the […]

item.title: Zillow just downgraded its home price forecast across over 400 housing markets—see the map
item.description: Zillow slightly downgrades its national home price outlook—predicting that over the next 12 months, U.S. home prices are likely to shift +0.0%. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: When brands become actors
item.description: How AI is rewriting the rules of brand architecture. For decades, brands functioned primarily as symbols. A logo, a name, a set of visual and verbal signals designed to convey trust, recognition, and meaning.

item.title: Get Ankers 14-in-1 Thunderbolt 5 Dock for $60 less at Amazon
item.description: As of April 22, you can get the Anker Prime 14-in-1 Thunderbolt 5 Dock for $339.99 at Amazon, down from $399.99. That's a 15% discount or $60 savings.

item.title: Russia eyes 'whitelist' of approved VPNs to stop internet blocks harming businesses
item.description: The State Duma proposes to create a list of "white VPNs" permitted in Russia to minimize 'inconveniences' caused by the authorities' quest to 'reduce VPN usage.' Here's all we know.

item.title: IPTV : le chef d’un réseau pirate écope de 23 mois de prison et de 8,7 millions d’euros d’amende
item.description: La justice espagnole s'est montrée sévère avec le patron d'un réseau IPTV pirate. Après avoir accepté un accord, l'homme a écopé de 23 mois de prison ferme et de 8,7 millions d'euros d'amende. C'est une sanction particulièrement dure dans une affaire de piratage de contenus.

item.title: Get some new wrist candy with the CMF Watch Pro 2 at its lowest price ever
item.description: As of April 22, get the CMF Watch Pro 2 for its lowest price yet.

item.title: The Bang & Olufsen Beosound Explore Bluetooth speaker is at the lowest price weve seen all year
item.description: The Bang & Olufsen Beosound Explore Bluetooth speaker is on sale at Amazon for $224, down from the normal price of $299. That's a 25% discount.
